title: Unemployed people are important for a country?
description:
Zero percent unemployment sounds like a dream — but economists say it would actually break India's economy. When no workers are available, businesses can't grow, salaries spiral out of control, inflation shoots up, and productivity crashes. Nobel Prize winners Milton Friedman and Edmund Phelps proved that every healthy economy needs a natural unemployment rate of around 4 to 6 percent to stay stable. The Soviet Union tried achieving zero unemployment from 1930 to 1991 and collapsed into 15 pieces. Here's what that tells us about how economies really work.
#Shorts #IndianEconomy #Unemployment #Economics #BusinessFacts
